name: Scott Morris
title: Founder & Lead Installer, Right Choice Seamless Gutters
bio: Scott has been installing seamless gutters across Central Virginia since 2014. First as a one-man crew with a truck and a gutter machine, now leading a full team. He's an authorized Leaf Solution dealer and personally walks every estimate that goes out the door. (Placeholder bio: Scott to provide his actual story, family, and any certifications.)
